narrative:
Precinct Andover Village (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 644 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.8 percentage points.
